# Full App Testing & Debugging

## What This Skill Accomplishes

This skill performs comprehensive testing, debugging, and performance analysis for full-stack applications. It automatically analyzes, tests, and validates both frontend and backend systems, identifies bugs, detects performance bottlenecks, and ensures production readiness.

## When to Use

- Before deploying to production
- After major feature additions
- When experiencing bugs or performance issues
- For validating payment integrations
- During QA cycles
- When optimizing application performance

## Input Handling

- Accepts project codebase or specific files (frontend, backend, API routes, payment modules)
- Accepts tech stack details (e.g., React, Node.js, Python, Stripe, Firebase, etc.)

## Procedure

### 1. Payment System Testing
- Validate payment gateway integration
- Check API calls, authentication, and webhook handling
- Detect failed transactions and misconfigurations
- Simulate test payments and edge cases

### 2. Backend Testing & Optimization
- Analyze API performance and response times
- Detect slow queries, inefficient logic, and server bottlenecks
- Suggest optimizations (caching, indexing, async processing)

### 3. Frontend Testing
- Validate UI flows and API integration
- Detect broken components, incorrect states, and UX issues
- Test responsiveness and edge cases

### 4. End-to-End Testing
- Simulate complete user journeys (signup → usage → payment)
- Ensure data consistency across systems

### 5. Automated Test Case Generation
Generate:
- Functional tests
- Edge cases
- Negative tests
- Load tests
- Security tests

### 6. Error Detection & Fix Suggestions
- Identify bugs with severity levels
- Provide root cause analysis
- Suggest exact code-level fixes

### 7. Final Report
- Summary of issues
- Performance insights
- Production readiness status (Go / No-Go)
- Deployment checklist

## Expected Output

- Structured debugging report
- List of test cases
- Optimization suggestions
- Clear actionable fixes

## Behavior Notes

- Be precise and technical
- Focus on real-world debugging and production scenarios
- Prioritize critical issues (payments, backend performance, security)
